channel.title: UDP on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in UDP on William Fang

item.title: Linux 网络参数优化
item.description: 设置 sysctl ## 如果出现报错 sysctl: cannot stat /proc/sys/–p: No such file or directory ## 则需要执行以下命令 modprobe br_netfilter ls /proc/sys/net/bridge ## 记得输入该命令及时生效 sysctl -p /etc/sysctl

item.title: CppServer
item.description: 安装 apt-get install uuid-dev pip3 install gil git clone https://github.com/chronoxor/CppServer.git cd CppServer gil update cd modules rm -rf asio pc git clone git@github.com:chriskohlhoff/asio.git 编译 cd build ./unix.sh
